title: Iliad, Book 17: The Battle Over Patroclus
description: Book 17 of Homer's Iliad: The Battle Over Patroclus.
introduction: Book 17 of the Iliad: The Battle Over Patroclus. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Οὐδ᾿ ἔλαθ᾿ Ἀτρέος υἱὸν ἀρηΐφιλον Μενέλαον Πάτροκλος Τρώεσσι δαμείς.
translation.text: Menelaus stood over Patroclus' body like a mother cow over her calf. Hector stripped Achilles' armor from the corpse and put it on. Ajax and Menelaus fought all day to recover the body.
